steps.text: Run Meta / Instagram ad campaign
Parent clicks → landing page
Parent fills out Free Trial Form, Books a Trial, or Fills in a Contact Form
Existing member refers a friend
Staff logs referral extension ticket
Add 4-week extension in scheduling app
Confirmation sent to parent
Capture training footage at session
Edit + post to Instagram / TikTok
Reply to DMs / comments
New lead comes in via Free Trial Form or Contact Form
Lead gets put into the 'interested' stage in the GoHighLevel pipeline
Human either puts them in the 'sms ghosted' pipeline or messages them to come to a trial (using the link), or marks them as lost
Lead books a trial
Parent DMs / calls / emails
Human qualifies + answers questions + nudges them to book a trial
If they don't book a trial, put them in SMS ghosted
If a trial does not show up, a human puts them in the no-show automation
Lead gets put back into the 'interested' stage
Continue from 'TEXTING LEADS' workflow
Lead books a trial
Internal and External confirmations get sent out
Lead gets put into the 'booked trial' stage
Check ins get sent out
Human assists lead on getting to the trial where needed
Lead attends trial
Lead sales person attempts to close them, sends them a link
Lead sales person updates the Lead Tracker and keeps track of notes
Parent clicks on onboarding link
Parent goes through onboarding funnel [info, policy, product selection, payment]
Stripe subscription activates, account gets created in coachIQ, credits assigned, welcome automations kicked off
Human adds them to the member tracker, updates them in the leads spreadsheet, and ensures it's marked as won in GHL
Human gives them merch
Fil assigns connection lead in the member tracker
Parent requests upgrade / downgrade
Human Submits ticket in Asana, and responds to them
Human calculates changes, updates Member Tracker updates credits, and updates stripe subscription, relays info back to the team
Team reaches out to parent with updates
Parent requests pause
Staff gathers the start/end date of the pause
Submit Glue Guy ticket (after gathering the start + end date)
Backend staff extends the next payment of the user, makes sure their credits are good, updates the member tracker and notifies the team when their next payment is
Front-end team notifies the parent of the updates
Parent requests cancel
Frontend staff confirms it with Fil/Zoran
Frontend staff submits Glue Guy ticket to cancel
Backend staff cancels the subscription on stripe, updates the member tracker, updates the credits
Parent requests refund
Frontend staff confirms with Fil/Zoran
Frontend staff submits glue guy ticket to cancel
Backend staff calculates the correct amount to refund, and sends the refund through stripe
Parent requests to change their payment method
Frontend staff submits a glue guy ticket to get the link to change payment method
Backend staff sends the frontend staff the link
Frontend staff sends link to parent
Payment fails
Entire team gets notified automatically
Lead connection reaches out to figure out what the issue is and help solve it
Parent voices issue with credits
Frontend team submits glue guy ticket with a description of the issue
Backend team solves the issue and gives the front end team the info, and logs if it's a core problem with the software to Zoran
Front end team communicates the fix with the Parent
